emptyState.title: Welcome to Snippets!
emptyState.description: Organize, search, and reuse your favorite code. Create your first snippet to get started.
emptyState.localData: Your data is saved locally and kept between sessions

storage.heading: Storage
storage.desktopOnly: Storage configuration is only available in the desktop app.
storage.localStorageNote: Data saved in the app's internal storage (localStorage).
storage.snippetCountInfo_one: {{count}} snippet stored. Changing the location will copy all data to the new folder.
storage.snippetCountInfo_other: {{count}} snippets stored. Changing the location will copy all data to the new folder.
storage.successChangeFolder: Storage location changed successfully! Data has been migrated to the new folder.

tray.heading: System Tray
tray.minimizeLabel: Keep Snippet Palace in the tray when closing the window
tray.minimizeDescription: Closing the window hides the app in the tray instead of quitting.
tray.hotSnippetsDescription: Quick access to favorite snippets from the tray (max. 10).

layout.heading: Layout
layout.description: Restore panel widths (sidebar, list, and detail) to their default values.

newSnippetModal.createSubtitle: Create and organize your code with ease
newSnippetModal.titlePlaceholder: E.g.: Remove Duplicates SQL, API Rate Limiter...
newSnippetModal.errorFillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
newSnippetModal.errorGeneric: Error creating snippet. Please try again.

deleteConfirmationModal.whatToDoSingular: What would you like to do with that snippet?
deleteConfirmationModal.whatToDoPlural: What would you like to do with those snippets?

snippetDetail.selectSnippetDescription: Choose a snippet from the list to view its content and details here.
snippetDetail.hotLimitReached: Limit of 10 Hot Snippets reached. Unmark one first.
snippetDetail.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

snippetCard.hotSnippetTooltip: Hot Snippet — available in the tray

snippetList.noSnippetsInCategory: No snippets in the selected category
snippetList.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

ticketLogModal.title: JIRA Ticket History
ticketLogModal.filterPlaceholder: Filter by ticket number or description...
ticketLogModal.noRecordsHint: Log snippets that resolved JIRA tickets to find them quickly later.
ticketLogModal.problemDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the problem this snippet solved...

allSnippets.title: 📄 All Snippets
allSnippets.content: Here you'll find all your saved snippets, regardless of folder, project, or language. It's your central point to access all your content.

favorites.title: ❤️ Favorites
favorites.content: Click here to see only your favorite snippets. Mark a snippet as a favorite by clicking the heart icon.

newSnippet.title: ✨ Create New Snippet
newSnippet.content: Click here to add a new snippet. You can set a title, language, tags, and more. Use Ctrl+N as a shortcut.

quickCopy.title: ⚡ Quick Copy
quickCopy.content: Double-click any snippet to automatically copy it to your clipboard with visual feedback.

folders.title: 📁 Folders
folders.content: Organize your snippets into folders to keep everything organized by context or category. You can create folder hierarchies.

projects.title: 🚀 Projects
projects.content: Manage your projects and organize snippets by work context. Ideal for separating code from different applications.

search.title: 🔍 Smart Search
search.content: Use search to find snippets by title, content, tags, or language. Search is smart and real-time.

doubleClickTip.copyContent: Congrats on your first snippet! 🎉 Quick tip: Double-click any snippet to automatically copy it to your clipboard.
doubleClickTip.organizeContent: Right-click any snippet to access organization options, like moving it to folders and projects.
